rationale: Educ. Code §12.109 governs charter school transportation obligations. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: An open-enrollment charter school shall provide transportation to each student attending the school to the same extent a school district is required by law to provide transportation to district students.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
